Fund News & Trends.title: "Oil Demand Is About To Spike... We're Looking At A Volatile Summer" Says Schork
Fund News & Trends.summary: Oil prices may have decreased, but with hundreds of millions of barrels having been taken off the market due to the Iran War, true relief is not quite on the horizon yet—even with a ceasefire in the region. The Schork Group's Co-Founder & Editor Stephen Schork joins Christina Ruffini and Tim Stenovec on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

Fund News & Trends.title: How to Fight a War in Space
Fund News & Trends.summary: Space lasers and orbital nuclear weapons could be how World War III begins, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Andreas Kluth explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

Fund News & Trends.title: The Choke Point That Could Break the Global Economy
Fund News & Trends.summary: The war with Iran has already cost lives, billions of dollars, and shaken the foundations of the global economy and the worst may be yet to come. Afsaneh Beschloss of RockCreek tells us why Russia and Iran are the unexpected winners at the Strait of Hormuz, and why a prolonged conflict could force the Fed to hike rates instead of cut. Fund News & Trends.title: Secretary General Dominguez Rejects Tolls on Strait of Hormuz
Fund News & Trends.summary: As the Strait of Hormuz remains closed for the sixth week, International Maritime Organization Secretary-General Arsenio Dominguez joins Christina Ruffini and Tim Stenovec on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss this weekend's negotiations and the 20,000 seafarers stranded in and around the Strait of Hormuz. Watch the full interview on Bloomberg This Weekend. Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

Fund News & Trends.title: War Diversion Sparks 40% More Ships Refueling in Mauritius Port
Fund News & Trends.summary: The island nation of Mauritius has become an increasingly popular refueling stop for commercial cargo vessels avoiding the Middle East due to the Iran war.

Fund News & Trends.title: Bank of England Set to Discuss Anthropic’s Mythos With Banks
Fund News & Trends.summary: The Bank of England plans to discuss the impact of Anthropic PBC’s new AI model with financial institutions, as UK regulators join their peers in the US and elsewhere in raising alarms over the risks posed by the tool.

Fund News & Trends.title: Assessing Asset Volatility and Iran War Threats: Masters in Business with Mike Pyle
Fund News & Trends.summary: Barry speaks with Mike Pyle, Senior Managing Director, is the Deputy Head of BlackRock’s Portfolio Management Group (PMG). They discuss the durable economic shocks that could result from the war with Iran including energy security. They also discuss his time in the Biden administration as Deputy National Security Advisor for International Economics. (Source: Bloomberg)

Fund News & Trends.title: Europe Energy Traders Brace for 21-Hour Day as Volatility Surges
Fund News & Trends.summary: European gas and power markets, once a niche corner of global energy trading, are in for a major change next week: Hours will more than double to 21 from 10, ending the narrow daytime window that has been the norm for years.

Platforms & Products.title: Former Fed official argues against Fed independence
Platforms & Products.summary: Former Federal Reserve Vice Chair for Supervision Randal Quarles, who served during President Trump's first term, said members of the Fed board should be removable by the president, but that the decentralized structure of the Fed will ensure that monetary policy decisions remain sound.
